generated_exposure.exposure_text: Our allies are cutting corners on defense spending while expecting us to foot the bill. Remember the 2024 NATO summit? Key members pledged 2% GDP on defense, but only 3 out of 30 met the target. Meanwhile, our tax dollars keep flowing overseas. Time to demand accountability and focus on securing our own borders first. #AllianceCommitment #NationalSecurity
